ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., humidity, pressure, wind speed) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the sensor belongs to */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_readings" (
  "humidity_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the humidity reading belongs to */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity value */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_readings" (
  "pressure_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the pressure reading belongs to */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure value */,
  "sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Sea level pressure value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speed_readings" (
  "wind_speed_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the wind speed reading belongs to */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed value */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_speed_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speed_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_readings" (
  "temperature_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the temperature reading belongs to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature value */,
  "heat_index" REAL /* Heat index value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the prediction was made for */,
  "prediction" REAL /* Predicted value */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the prediction (e.g., 1 for accurate, 2 for inaccurate) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather event (e.g., rain, snow, extreme weather) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the weather event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the weather event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_readings" (
  "event_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event reading */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather event that the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_readings_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_readings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES weather_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, meteorologist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., reading, prediction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
